texto: He often paused before he spoke. She thought this exquisite
autor: it was as though he had such regard for his listener that he wanted his words strung together in the best possible way.
explicacao: Citação de it was as though he had such regard for his listener that he wanted his words strung together in the best possible way. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “He often paused before he spoke. She thought this exquisite” articula reflexao, chimamanda-ngozi-adichie, often em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
